slices.lastFinding: Gitar PR #59: resolveBundleFile called registry.resolveBundle redundantly. Folded inline in commit 53377e6.
Gitar PR #60: register() after stop() could leak a chokidar instance. Folded inline in commit dba1d4f via a `stopping` flag guard; +1 regression test.
Gitar PR #61: quarantine() deleted source file even when copyFileSync failed. Folded inline in commit 72fe972 by restructuring quarantine to write .error.json first, then copy+rm in a guarded try.

Gitar PR #62 first review clean (zero findings). Chain-close slice — consolidates ThroughlineStatusBlock + BootstrapReviewBlock into unified BootstrapBlock + Phase 21 render/state/quarantine affordances.

notes.previousChain: phase-20-bootstrap-ingest closed via PR #56 (tracking issue #52 closed 2026-05-27); the prior .claude-code/auto-continue-state.json was overwritten at Phase 21 chain-open.
notes.labelGap: throughline:pause label still absent in repo at Phase 21 chain-close (fourth consecutive chain boundary without it). Phase 21 chain ran end-to-end clean on the two fallback signals (marker file + /pause comment).
notes.slice2WatcherCleanup: Locked at chain-open and documented in watcher.ts module header + register() comment: accept the watcher-leak for the 'user renders prompt then never runs Claude Code' abandonment case.
notes.slice3ProjectsServiceRefactor: Slice 2's bootstrapWatcher?: BootstrapWatcherRegistry direct parameter on createProjectsService was replaced in slice 3 with an onBootstrapUnregister?: (projectId: string) => void callback. The construction cycle (watcher needs worker, worker needs import service, import service needs projects) couldn't be resolved with a direct-reference param.
notes.chainTotals: 4 slices, 3 fix-rounds (one per slices 1, 2, 3 — slice 4 first-review clean), 0 halt-class triggers. Net ~2585 lines under chain-open projection of 3500-4400. C-D21's six surfaces + .gitignore write all landed.
notes.sizingCalibration: Phase 21 estimated ~2200 raw / ~3500-4400 actual at chain-open (1.3-1.5× multiplier carried forward from Phases 19+20). Actual chain came in under projection because every slice consumed substantial existing precedent (inbox watcher + worker; existing canonicalisation; existing fastify routes). Phases 22+ should not assume the same headroom; this chain's discount was precedent-driven.
notes.nextChain: Phase 22 (discipline-drift scan-on-demand for bootstrapped projects). Doc prerequisites complete (T-D57 minted; SPEC §7.14 scan-on-demand mini-section + §14 row added). Next action: spec-author plan-mode entry for Phase 22 chain-open.
